meta_description: Uhlu olwesheshayo kanye nolungatshiwe lwemikhombi yomphakathi yaseNingizimu Afrika, olungatholwa ngeviki kulomjikelezo wemikhombi yomphakathi kaDPSA.
footer_disclaimer_1: Imikhombi iphakishiwe kabusha kusuka kuMnyango Wezinhlelo Zomphakathi Kanye Noadministheyshini (DPSA) Umjikelezo Wemikhombi Yomphakathi. Lolu uhlu oluzimele, olungakamangalezi ngesisindo.
footer_disclaimer_2: Hlala ukhumbula ukucela imininingwane emnyangweni eshiwo kumafomula, ngumhla wokuvalwa oshiwo.
mt_notice: Lokhu kunguhumusho lowenziwe namashini. Inguqulo yeNgilezi ingumkhuluzo.
listing_description: {total} imikhombi yomphakathi yaseNingizimu Afrika kusuka ku-{label}. Sesha futhi uhlele ngomniningwane, isifunda, isikhala, inkokhelo kanye nomhla wokuvalwa.
no_js_note: Uhlu ludinga i-JavaScript. Yonke imikhombi ibhalisiwe; sebenzisa umsebenzi wokutholakala websanithi yakho (Ctrl/⌘-F).
apply_note: Khumbula ngqo kuya komininingwane, ngumhla wokuvalwa, uphakamisele isethenjwa.
dd_tail: . Lolu uhlu oluzimele; isibasiselo kulomjikelezo kuwumkhuluzo.
about_description: Indlela yokuthi eli sithombe esizimele semikhombi yomphakathi yaseNingizimu Afrika lisebenza.
about_p1: Ngeviki ngayinye (ngaphandle kuka-Disemba) umnyango WeZinhlelo Zomphakathi Kanye Noadministheyshini upapaza iMjikelezo Yemikhombi Yomphakathi: isabali esisodwa, eside elibhalisa yonke imikhombi emaphasendle nasemaphansi kahulumeni. Lungezinhle, kodwa kunzima ukusesha, futhi kuzwakala njalo kumakhanisimane kanye noxhumeko oluphansi.
about_p2: Lesi siti sipapaza kabusha izimilo eziyodwa imikhombi ngesisindebele esingenani. Sifunda i-mjikelezo yamanje, siyihluke ibe yimikhombi eyodwa, futhi sibonise iwunye njengekhasi ongazisheshela okulandelayo, uhlela, futhi uvule ngokushesha. Amapheji alula nangisize, ngakho alwela lokho kumaxhumelo aliphansi futhi asebenza nize i-JavaScript ivaliwe.
about_p3: Lolu uhlu oluzimele, olungakamangalezi. Asitholi izicelo futhi asikho umqashi. Yonke isibasiselo ibhalisa imininingwane yokucela kwayo, umhla wokuvalwa, kanye nenombolo yesethenjwa: khumbula ngqo komininingwane yalelo mhla, ngelemininingwane yalelo mhla. Lapho kwenzeka okwahlukene nenkolo ayazwile, imjikelezo iyiqiniso.
archive_description: Phakamisela imjikelezo emahluzi edlule Yemikhombi Yomphakathi.
archive_intro: Wonke umjikelezo omahluzi esisebenzile, omnumzane kuqala. Imikhombi endala itshaye ngenakho; izamatholakele kumbuzo.
e404_body: Imikhombi ingase ishaye esifundweni, noma isixhumanisi soba sekhulile. Qala kabusha kusuka kumjikelezo wamanje.
